description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent terracotta gable roof and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a small covered porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, flanked by large windows and landscaped garden beds. A driveway leads to a covered carport on the right side, separated by a low white fence from the main garden area. The rear of the bungalow has a private patio area accessible via a back door, enclosed by a low wall. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with minimal window openings and a consistent roofline. The property is surrounded by a neatly maintained green lawn, enhancing its suburban residential appeal.
description: A single-story bungalow with a terracotta gable roof, white walls, a front porch, carport, and landscaped garden, set within a fenced green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entrance, large windows, driveway, carport, and landscaped garden beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the gable roof, the carport, and the side garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, a single rear door, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side wall, roof profile, and the transition from driveway to garden.
